'''''Moori''''' was the designation of a group of two [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] under the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were part of the Rebels' second attempt to destroy Space installation [[NL-1]] during the [[Battle on the Frontier]], but they were destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
